revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]] to [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]] to [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Dd]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump1-19]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category|Agglutinative languages}} {{Cat main|Agglutinative language}} Articles relating to [[agglutinative language]]s, a type of [[synthetic language]] with morphology that primarily uses [[agglutination]]. Words may contain different [[morpheme]]s to determine their meanings, but all of these morphemes (including [[word stem|stem]]s and [[affix]]es) remain, in every aspect, unchanged after their unions. {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:Synthetic languages]] [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] [[en:Category:Agglutinative languages]][[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[en:Category:Agglutinative languages]][[en:Agglutinative languages]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category|Agglutinative languages}} {{Cat main|Agglutinative language}} Articles relating to [[agglutinative language]]s, a type of [[synthetic language]] with morphology that primarily uses [[agglutination]]. Words may contain different [[morpheme]]s to determine their meanings, but all of these morphemes (including [[word stem|stem]]s and [[affix]]es) remain, in every aspect, unchanged after their unions. {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:Synthetic languages]] [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] [[en:Category:Agglutinative languages]][[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[en:Category:Agglutinative languages]][[en:Agglutinative languages]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Bump1-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (5 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Synthetic languages]]
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki linked categories]][[en:Category:"
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories from wikipedia
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 4 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Removing from [[Category:R2024-01-19]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8791301)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category|Agglutinative languages}}
{{Cat main|Agglutinative language}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8791301}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Agglutinative languages]]
[[en:Category:Agglutinative languages]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:enwiki linked categories]]
